# OpenCensus Proto

{{ pypi }}

Python library generated from OpenCensus cross-language protos.

## Installation

```
pip install opencensus-proto
```

modules.name: opencensus.proto.agent.metrics.v1.metrics_service_pb2_grpc
documentation: Generated by the gRPC Python protocol compiler plugin. DO NOT EDIT!

classes.name: opencensus.proto.agent.metrics.v1.metrics_service_pb2_grpc.MetricsServiceStub

methods.name: opencensus.proto.agent.metrics.v1.metrics_service_pb2_grpc.MetricsServiceStub.__init__
documentation:
Constructor.

Args:
  channel: A grpc.Channel.

Service that can be used to push metrics between one Application
instrumented with OpenCensus and an agent, or between an agent and a
central collector.

classes.name: opencensus.proto.agent.metrics.v1.metrics_service_pb2_grpc.MetricsServiceServicer

methods.name: opencensus.proto.agent.metrics.v1.metrics_service_pb2_grpc.MetricsServiceServicer.Export
documentation:
For performance reasons, it is recommended to keep this RPC
alive for the entire life of the application.

Service that can be used to push metrics between one Application
instrumented with OpenCensus and an agent, or between an agent and a
central collector.

modules.name: opencensus.proto.agent.trace.v1.trace_service_pb2_grpc
documentation: Generated by the gRPC Python protocol compiler plugin. DO NOT EDIT!

classes.name: opencensus.proto.agent.trace.v1.trace_service_pb2_grpc.TraceServiceStub

methods.name: opencensus.proto.agent.trace.v1.trace_service_pb2_grpc.TraceServiceStub.__init__
documentation:
Constructor.

Args:
  channel: A grpc.Channel.

Service that can be used to push spans and configs between one Application
instrumented with OpenCensus and an agent, or between an agent and a
central collector or config service (in this case spans and configs are
sent/received to/from multiple Applications).

classes.name: opencensus.proto.agent.trace.v1.trace_service_pb2_grpc.TraceServiceServicer

methods.name: opencensus.proto.agent.trace.v1.trace_service_pb2_grpc.TraceServiceServicer.Config
documentation:
After initialization, this RPC must be kept alive for the entire life of
the application. The agent pushes configs down to applications via a
stream.

methods.name: opencensus.proto.agent.trace.v1.trace_service_pb2_grpc.TraceServiceServicer.Export
documentation:
For performance reasons, it is recommended to keep this RPC
alive for the entire life of the application.

Service that can be used to push spans and configs between one Application
instrumented with OpenCensus and an agent, or between an agent and a
central collector or config service (in this case spans and configs are
sent/received to/from multiple Applications).
